name: tokr
description: JSON edit-list video pipeline + Remotion graphics/subtitles

scripts.sync-public: cp build/base.mp4 build/subtitles.json build/cut-meta.json video/public/ && cp edits/roman-v1.json video/public/edit.json
scripts.render: npm run sync-public && npm --prefix video run render
scripts.render:previews: npm --prefix video run render:transit && npm --prefix video run render:spy && npm --prefix video run render:spec
